# Contingent Claims Valuation L2

> Value contingent claims — binomial model (one- and two-period), BSM assumptions and formula, carry benefits, Black model for futures/swaptions, option Greeks, implied volatility

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** derivatives · options · bsm · binomial-model · option-greeks · implied-volatility · cfa-level-2

## What this does

Value contingent claims — binomial model (one- and two-period), BSM assumptions and formula, carry benefits, Black model for futures/swaptions, option Greeks, implied volatility

Specifies 2 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **option_id** *(text, required)* — Option identifier
- **model_type** *(select, required)* — binomial | bsm | black

## What must be true

- **no_arbitrage_principles → put_call_parity:** C − P = S − PV(X); holds under no-arbitrage
- **no_arbitrage_principles → bounds:** Call: max(0, S−PV(X)); Put: max(0, PV(X)−S)
- **binomial_one_period → risk_neutral_probability:** π = (1+r − d) / (u − d)
- **binomial_one_period → option_value:** V0 = [π × Vu + (1−π) × Vd] / (1+r)
- **binomial_one_period → replication:** Portfolio of stock + bond that replicates option payoff
- **two_period_binomial → backward_induction:** Work from terminal nodes back to today
- **two_period_binomial → calls_puts:** Exercise decision at each node
- **two_period_binomial → dividends:** Reduce up/down factors at ex-date
- **interest_rate_options → cap_floor:** Series of caplets/floorlets; reference vs strike
- **interest_rate_options → multiperiod_binomial:** Rate tree; each node computes caplet payoff
- **bsm_assumptions → underlying:** Lognormal returns; no jumps
- **bsm_assumptions → constant_vol:** σ fixed over life
- **bsm_assumptions → continuous_trading:** No frictions, short selling allowed
- **bsm_assumptions → risk_free_constant:** Flat term structure
- **bsm_formula → call:** C = S × N(d1) − PV(X) × N(d2)
- **bsm_formula → put:** P = PV(X) × N(−d2) − S × N(−d1)
- **bsm_formula → d1:** (ln(S/X) + (r + σ²/2)T) / (σ√T)
- **bsm_formula → d2:** d1 − σ√T
- **carry_benefits_extension → dividends:** Replace S with S × e^{−qT}; lowers call, raises put
- **carry_benefits_extension → fx_options:** Foreign risk-free rate acts as carry yield
- **carry_benefits_extension → futures_options:** S = F × e^{−rT} (Black model)
- **black_model → call:** Bl(F, X, T, σ, r)
- **black_model → use_for:** Futures options, caps, floors, swaptions
- **black_model → swaption:** Receiver/payer swaption valued on forward swap rate
- **greeks → delta:** ∂V/∂S; sensitivity to underlying price
- **greeks → gamma:** ∂²V/∂S²; rate of change of delta
- **greeks → theta:** ∂V/∂t; time decay (usually negative for long)
- **greeks → vega:** ∂V/∂σ; sensitivity to volatility
- **greeks → rho:** ∂V/∂r; sensitivity to interest rate
- **delta_hedging → portfolio_delta:** Sum of position deltas × holdings
- **delta_hedging → dynamic_hedging:** Rebalance continuously; gamma risk remains
- **implied_volatility → definition:** σ that equates BSM price to market price
- **implied_volatility → vol_smile:** Lower/higher strikes often imply higher vol
- **implied_volatility → vol_skew:** Equity smirk: OTM puts rich relative to model
- **validation → option_required:** option_id present
- **validation → valid_model:** model_type in [binomial, bsm, black]

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Value Option** — when option_id exists; model_type in ["binomial","bsm","black"], then call service; emit option.valued. _Why: Value contingent claim using selected model._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Invalid Model** — when model_type not_in ["binomial","bsm","black"], then emit option.rejected. _Why: Unsupported model._ *(error: `OPTION_INVALID_MODEL`)*

## Errors it can return

- `OPTION_INVALID_MODEL` — model_type must be one of the supported option models

## Events

**`option.valued`**
  Payload: `option_id`, `model_type`, `value`, `delta`, `gamma`, `vega`, `theta`

**`option.rejected`**
  Payload: `option_id`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **forward-commitments-valuation-l2** *(required)*
- **bonds-with-embedded-options-l2** *(recommended)*
